title: OP Woods
description: Turn wood into an overpowered loot source with this fun and fast-paced datapack.
body:
The Wood is OP datapack turns basic wooden blocks into a powerful resource. Breaking wood now has a chance to drop overpowered items, rare materials, or enchanted gear, making early-game progression faster and more exciting.

This datapack is perfect for fun survival worlds, custom challenges, and multiplayer servers where gameplay is boosted and chaos is encouraged. It keeps vanilla mechanics intact while adding a unique twist to resource gathering.

Features

Wood drops OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, and armor

Speeds up early-game progression

Fun and chaotic survival gameplay

Works with vanilla Minecraft mechanics

Suitable for singleplayer and multiplayer
